behaviors.description: Missing required key across file+env reports exact dotted config path (e.g., `database.host`).
behaviors.justification: MOCK-MISS: failure is at the handoff contract between config sources and validation/error formatting: "absent from both the file and the environment" plus exact path naming. A single-function unit test of validator logic can miss source-merge omissions or path propagation bugs. REAL-INFRA: no real OS/network/subprocess required. MOCK-HIDE: stubbing one source can hide merge/preference defects. LLM-DEP/MULTI-STEP: none. REJECTION-GATE: rejected System because behavior text is about loader error content, not subprocess/OS-only effects; rejected Agentic/Workflow because no AI model decisions are involved.
behaviors.test_description: Run loader in-process with a temp config file missing the required nested key and no corresponding `TOOL_...` env var; assert raised startup error includes the exact missing path string (e.g., `database.host`) after file+env merge/validation.

behaviors.justification: MOCK-MISS: concrete cross-module contract is env resolution -> path builder -> file loader target path. REAL-INFRA: no subprocess/network; local env+filesystem is sufficient. MOCK-HIDE: if path resolution is mocked, wrong precedence between `XDG_CONFIG_HOME` and default home path can be hidden. LLM-DEP/MULTI-STEP: none. REJECTION-GATE: rejected System because behavior text only requires resolving path relative to env var, not OS-level behavior that needs external process/network; rejected Agentic/Workflow due no AI call.
behaviors.test_description: Set `XDG_CONFIG_HOME` to a temp directory containing config file at `<xdg>/tool/config.yaml`, also place a different file under default `~/.config/tool/config.yaml`; run loader and assert it reads the XDG location (e.g., resulting loaded value matches XDG file).

behaviors.description: `TOOL_` environment variable overrides conflicting key from config file.
behaviors.justification: MOCK-MISS: specific boundary is parser output + env-mapping layer + precedence resolver; bug appears when modules combine conflicting values. REAL-INFRA: no OS/network/subprocess needed beyond in-process env setup. MOCK-HIDE: mocking env mapping or merge logic independently can miss precedence bugs. LLM-DEP/MULTI-STEP: none. REJECTION-GATE: rejected System because behavior text is deterministic precedence, not real external infrastructure behavior; rejected Agentic/Workflow because no model output dependency.
behaviors.test_description: Create config file with key `database.host=filehost`, set `TOOL_DATABASE_HOST=envhost`, run loader in-process, assert final config value is `envhost`.

behaviors.description: YAML syntax errors surface line number in actionable error message.
behaviors.justification: MOCK-MISS: cross-module contract is YAML parser exception metadata -> loader error translation; line number can be dropped or reformatted incorrectly at boundary. REAL-INFRA: no network/subprocess; local parsing only. MOCK-HIDE: mocking parser to return canned errors can hide real parser metadata shape differences. LLM-DEP/MULTI-STEP: none. REJECTION-GATE: rejected System because behavior text concerns parser-detected syntax location, not OS/subprocess/network phenomena; rejected Agentic/Workflow because no AI dependency.
behaviors.test_description: Provide malformed YAML file with known syntax error line; invoke loader and assert emitted error message includes that line number from actual parser failure.

behaviors.description: On first run with missing config directory, loader creates directory and writes defaults file before continuing.
behaviors.justification: MOCK-MISS: contract spans startup flow orchestration: existence check -> mkdir -> defaults write -> subsequent load/proceed. REAL-INFRA: requires local filesystem I/O, which fits Integration (local filesystem) and does not require subprocess/network. MOCK-HIDE: fake FS can hide path-join/order-of-operations issues, so use real temp filesystem. LLM-DEP/MULTI-STEP: none. REJECTION-GATE: rejected System because behavior text is local startup file creation, not OS event watchers/subprocess/network behavior; rejected Agentic/Workflow for lack of AI model decisions.
behaviors.test_description: Start with empty temp root and env directing config home there; run loader, assert config directory now exists, defaults file exists with expected baseline keys, and loader proceeds to return config object (or success state) after write.
